# Custom NTM Command Palette
#
# Format:
#   ## Category Name
#   ### command_key | Display Label
#   The prompt text (can be multiple lines)

## Coding & Development

### my_continue_dev | Continue development & communicate
Great! Make sure that your changes are commited and the bead that you worked on is closed if you've compeleted the work

Carefully check your agent mail to see if you have any messages and respond to them. Then pick the next bead and continue development. Make sure to actively communicate and let your fellow agents know what you are working on along with responding back whenever messages come in


## Analysis & Review

### my_refine_beads | Refine Beads for Jr Devs
Carefully and with extreme detail and ruthlessness, review all of the beads for this project and ensure that they detailed and clear enough so that the only information that the developers need to implement the bead is the content of the bead and the codebase itself

Keep in mind that junior developers will be working on each bead so it needs to be crystal clear on what to do within each bead

### my_review_code_to_beads | Review code and turn to beads
Ok can you now turn your attention to reviewing the code written by your fellow agents and checking for any issues, bugs, errors, problems, inefficiencies, security problems, reliability issues, etc. and carefully diagnose their underlying root causes using first-principle analysis and then fix or revise them if necessary? 

Don't restrict yourself to the latest commits, cast a wider net and go super deep! Use ultrathink.

Do NOT write any code, simply create detailed beads of the issues that you identified for a future agent to work on

Before creating the beads be sure to check the current beads so you are not creating duplicate or overlapping work 


## Planning & Workflow

### my_prd_combine | Combine Competing PRDs
I just asked 3 competing LLMs to come up with PRDs for the same project

I want you to go through each of the PRDs line by line in a ruthless, egoless, unapologetic, and detail oriented way to combine all of the PRDs together to have one definitive extensive file that will then be used for development purposes. 

Be as exhaustive and comprehensive with details as possible so that the developers will know everything that they need to in order to build a development roadmap

When you're combining the PRDs make sure to think of the best way to keep the application that will be built future proof for the next 10 years. 

If you have any questions along the way ask me

### my_compare_beads_prd | Compare Beads with PRD
With extreme detail, ruthlessness, and unapologetically review each bead and compare it to what's in the PRD for this project. 

Check for gaps between what was written in the plan, and what is actually in the bead. Any gaps are found in the bead, update it so that it's crystal clear on what it should do.

### my_prd_review | Review the PRD 
Ruthlessly, unapologetically, and with extreme detail review the attached MD file to identify any bugs, edge cases, lack of clarity, and potential issues that may arise with it

Think that if you had 20/20 vision 10 years from now know what you know what would you do differently to make sure it is future proofed. The roadmap file will eventually be passed to a development team and they should know EXACTLY what needs to be done and how without any other context

Before providing me with recommendations, ask me questions to clarify exactly what I want built and my expectations so your review is as clear and thorough as possible
